ISO IEC 27701 Control Item(s): PIMS scope, leadership, policies, organizational roles, and support.
rationale: ARISE policy governance supports PIMS establishment and maintenance.

ISO IEC 27701 Control Item(s): Compliance obligations for controllers and processors, lawful basis, data-subject rights, and processor obligations.
rationale: ARISE regulatory compliance maps to identifying and implementing privacy obligations across controller/processor roles.

ISO IEC 27701 Control Item(s): Privacy risk planning, operation, performance evaluation, management review, and improvement.
rationale: ARISE risk management supports risk treatment and continual improvement in a PIMS.

ISO IEC 27701 Control Item(s): PII inventory, processing records, privacy by design, sharing/transfer, processor handling, and deletion/return.
rationale: ARISE dataset governance maps to PII identification, classification, flow, retention, and transfer controls.

ISO IEC 27701 Control Item(s): Data-subject notices, transparency, privacy by design communication, and processor support for data-subject rights.
rationale: ARISE privacy notification controls provide the communication and data-subject-facing evidence expected by ISO/IEC 27701.

ISO IEC 27701 Control Item(s): Supplier relationships, PII sharing/transfer, processor contracts, and subprocessor controls.
rationale: ARISE vendor risk maps to processor/subprocessor governance and contract obligations.

ISO IEC 27701 Control Item(s): Privacy incident handling and support for controller/processor notification duties.
rationale: ARISE incident management supports detection, escalation, notification, and corrective action for privacy incidents.
